response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, embedded, and IoT systems.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and code katas.
Proven ability to deliver scalable systems and contribute to DevOps infrastructure with Docker, CI/CD, and cloud tools.
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in the last 9+ years; core technical requirement unmet.
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, REST in automation contexts, or on-prem/cloud industrial platforms.
Current role is a career gap, and recent work is primarily in web/JS ecosystems, not high-performance systems.
